Educate Ambassadors!

For more information about the career opportunities available at ACS, or to apply, please contact the Principal:

 

Caroline VanGrootheest 

Phone: 613-327-2121

Email: principal@ambassadorschristianschool.ca

We invite applications for the following positions for the 2026-2027 school year:

 

Part-time and Full-time Teachers

Successful candidates are individuals who:

openly witness a personal commitment to Christ as Lord and Saviour

can articulate a depth of understanding of the biblical and philosophical foundations of Reformed Christian education

demonstrate a passion and commitment to teaching in a Reformed context

are members in good standing of a Canadian Reformed or other church that is a member of the North American Presbyterian and Reformed Council

Contact us with any questions or to request a consultation about your children's education.
